content.query:
SELECT *
FROM silver.dbo.dim_financial_account
WHERE account_number = 'ACC0001'
ORDER BY effective_from;

source:
df_actual = spark.table("silver.fact_financial_transactions").alias("a")
df_budget = spark.table("silver.fact_budget").alias("b")
df_company = spark.table("silver.dim_company").alias("c")
df_account = spark.table("silver.dim_financial_account").alias("d")

df_gold_budget_vs_actual = df_actual \
.join(
    df_budget,
    (col("a.company_sk") == col("b.company_sk")) &
    (col("a.account_sk") == col("b.account_number")),
    "left"
) \
.join(df_company, col("a.company_sk") == col("c.company_sk"), "left") \
.join(df_account, col("a.account_sk") == col("d.account_sk"), "left") \
.groupBy(
    col("c.company_name"),
    col("d.account_type")
) \
.agg(
    sum("a.amount_usd").alias("actual_amount"),
    sum("b.budget_amount").alias("budget_amount")

df_fact = spark.table("silver.fact_financial_transactions").alias("f")
df_cost = spark.table("silver.dim_cost_object").alias("c")

df_gold_cost = df_fact \
.join(
    df_cost,
    col("f.cost_object_sk") == col("c.cost_object_sk"),
    "left"
) \
.groupBy(
    col("c.cost_object_code")
) \
.agg(
    sum("f.amount_usd").alias("total_cost_usd")

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, lit
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
import pyspark.sql.functions as F

from pyspark.sql.functions import monotonically_increasing_id

df_fx_clean = df_fx_clean.withColumn(
    "exchange_rate_sk",
    monotonically_increasing_id()

df_budget_clean = df_fb.select(
    col("company_sk"),
    col("profit_unit_sk"),
    col("account_number"),
    col("fiscal_year").cast("int"),
    col("fiscal_month").cast("int"),
    col("budget_amount").cast("double")
).dropDuplicates()

from pyspark.sql.functions import col, lit
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from delta.tables import DeltaTable
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
import pyspark.sql.functions as F

df_company_silver = df_company.select(
    col("company_sk"),
    col("company_code"),
    col("company_name"),
    col("geography_sk"),
    col("base_currency_code"),
    col("reporting_currency_code"),
    col("industry_type"),
    col("active_flag"),
    col("created_timestamp")
).dropDuplicates()

df_geography_silver = df_geography.select(
    col("geography_sk"),
    col("country_code"),
    col("country_name"),
    col("region"),
    col("default_currency_code"),
    col("created_timestamp")
).dropDuplicates()

df_currency = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_currency")
#display(df_currency)

df_currency_silver = df_currency.select(
    col("currency_sk"),
    col("currency_code"),
    col("currency_name"),
    col("decimal_precision"),
    col("created_timestamp")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_currency_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_currency")

df_currency_type = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_currency_type")
#display(df_currency)

df_currency_type_silver = df_currency_type.select(
    col("currency_type_sk"),
    col("currency_type_name"),
    col("created_timestamp")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_currency_type_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_currency_type")

df_document_type = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_document_type")
#display(df_currency)

df_document_type_silver = df_document_type.select(
    col("document_type_sk"),
    col("document_type_code"),
    col("description"),
    col("created_timestamp")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_document_type_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_document_type")

df_calendar = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_fiscal_calendar")
#display(df_currency)

df_calendar_silver = df_calendar.select(
    col("fiscal_date_sk"),
    col("fiscal_date"),
    col("day_number"),
    col("week_number"),
    col("month_number"),
    col("fiscal_month"),
    col("fiscal_quarter"),
    col("fiscal_year"),
    col("month_name"),
    col("is_month_end"),
    col("is_quarter_end"),
    col("is_year_end")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_calendar_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_fiscal_calendar")

df_profit_unit = spark.read.format("parquet").load("abfss://bronze@synendtoenddev.dfs.core.windows.net/dim_profit_unit")
#display(df_currency)

df_profit_unit_silver = df_profit_unit.select(
    col("profit_unit_sk"),
    col("profit_unit_code"),
    col("company_sk"),
    col("business_line"),
    col("active_flag"),
    col("created_timestamp")
    ).dropDuplicates()

df_profit_unit_silver.write.format("delta").mode("overwrite").option("overwriteSchema","true").saveAsTable("silver.dim_profit_unit")

window_spec = Window.partitionBy("account_number").orderBy("source_updated_timestamp")

df_scd = df_source_fa.withColumn(
    "effective_from",
    F.col("source_updated_timestamp")
).withColumn(
    "effective_to",
    F.lead("source_updated_timestamp").over(window_spec)
).withColumn(
    "is_current",
    F.when(F.col("effective_to").isNull(), True).otherwise(False)
)

df_scd = df_scd.withColumn(
    "account_sk",
    F.monotonically_increasing_id()
)

window_spec = Window.partitionBy("cost_object_code").orderBy("source_updated_timestamp")

df_scd = df_source_co.withColumn(
    "effective_from",
    F.col("source_updated_timestamp")
).withColumn(
    "effective_to",
    F.lead("source_updated_timestamp").over(window_spec)
).withColumn(
    "is_current",
    F.when(F.col("effective_to").isNull(),True).otherwise(False)
)

df_scd = df_scd.withColumn(
    "cost_object_sk",
    F.monotonically_increasing_id()

import json

    StructField("transaction_id", IntegerType()),
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType()),
    StructField("profit_unit_sk", IntegerType()),
    StructField("cost_object_code", StringType()),
    StructField("account_number", StringType()),

    StructField("amount", DoubleType()),
    StructField("transaction_date", StringType())

df_stream = df_raw.selectExpr("CAST(body AS STRING) as message")

df_parsed = df_stream.select(
    from_json(col("message"), schema).alias("data")
).select("data.*")

df_final = df_joined.select(
    col("f.transaction_id"),

    col("c.cost_object_sk"),
    col("f.account_number"),

    col("c.cost_object_sk"),

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *
import random
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

geography_data = [
    (1, "IND", "India", "APAC", "INR"),
    (2, "USA", "United States", "Americas", "USD"),
    (3, "UAE", "United Arab Emirates", "Middle East", "AED"),
    (4, "CHN", "China", "APAC", "CNY")
]

schema = StructType([
    StructField("geography_sk", IntegerType(), False),        # Surrogate Key
    StructField("country_code", StringType(), False),         # Natural Key
    StructField("country_name", StringType(), False),
    StructField("region", StringType(), False),
    StructField("default_currency_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

# Add created timestamp
current_time = datetime.now()
geography_data_with_ts = [
    (*row, current_time) for row in geography_data
]

df_geography = spark.createDataFrame(geography_data_with_ts, schema)

companies = []
company_id = 1

# Distribution: India 6, USA 6, UAE 4, China 4
distribution = {
    "IND": 6,
    "USA": 6,
    "UAE": 4,
    "CHN": 4
}

current_time = datetime.now()

for country_code, count in distribution.items():
    
    geo_row = df_geography.filter(col("country_code") == country_code).collect()[0]
    geography_sk = geo_row["geography_sk"]
    base_currency = geo_row["default_currency_code"]
    
    for i in range(count):
        companies.append((
            company_id,                              # surrogate key
            f"COMP{company_id:03}",                  # natural key
            f"{country_code}_Company_{i+1}",
            geography_sk,
            base_currency,
            "USD",                                   # reporting currency
            random.choice(["Manufacturing", "Technology", "Logistics", "Retail"]),
            True,
            current_time
        ))
        
        company_id += 1

schema_company = StructType([
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("company_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("company_name", StringType(), False),
    StructField("geography_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("base_currency_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("reporting_currency_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("industry_type", StringType(), True),
    StructField("active_flag", BooleanType(), True),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), True)
])

df_company = spark.createDataFrame(companies, schema_company)

currency_data = [
    (1, "INR", "Indian Rupee", 2),
    (2, "USD", "US Dollar", 2),
    (3, "AED", "UAE Dirham", 2),
    (4, "CNY", "Chinese Yuan", 2)
]

schema_currency = StructType([
    StructField("currency_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("currency_code", StringType(), False),   # Natural Key
    StructField("currency_name", StringType(), False),
    StructField("decimal_precision", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

current_time = datetime.now()
currency_data_with_ts = [(*row, current_time) for row in currency_data]

df_currency = spark.createDataFrame(currency_data_with_ts, schema_currency)

df_currency.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_currency"

currency_type_data = [
    (1, "Transaction"),
    (2, "Base"),
    (3, "Reporting")
]

schema_currency_type = StructType([
    StructField("currency_type_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("currency_type_name", StringType(), False),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

currency_type_data_with_ts = [(*row, current_time) for row in currency_type_data]

df_currency_type = spark.createDataFrame(currency_type_data_with_ts, schema_currency_type)

df_currency_type.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_currency_type"

document_type_data = [
    (1, "INV", "Invoice"),
    (2, "PAY", "Payment"),
    (3, "ADJ", "Adjustment"),
    (4, "ACR", "Accrual"),
    (5, "REV", "Reversal")
]

schema_document_type = StructType([
    StructField("document_type_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("document_type_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("description", StringType(), False),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

document_type_data_with_ts = [(*row, current_time) for row in document_type_data]

df_document_type = spark.createDataFrame(document_type_data_with_ts, schema_document_type)

df_document_type.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_document_type"
)

start_date = datetime(2023, 1, 1)
end_date   = datetime(2025, 12, 31)

dates = []
current_date = start_date
sk = 1

while current_date <= end_date:
    dates.append((sk, current_date))
    current_date += timedelta(days=1)
    sk += 1

schema_calendar = StructType([
    StructField("fiscal_date_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("fiscal_date", DateType(), False)
])

df_calendar = spark.createDataFrame(dates, schema_calendar)

df_calendar = df_calendar \
    .withColumn("day_number", dayofmonth("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("week_number", weekofyear("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("month_number", month("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("fiscal_month", date_format("fiscal_date", "yyyy-MM")) \
    .withColumn("fiscal_quarter", concat(lit("Q"), quarter("fiscal_date"))) \
    .withColumn("fiscal_year", year("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("month_name", date_format("fiscal_date", "MMMM")) \
    .withColumn("is_month_end", last_day("fiscal_date") == col("fiscal_date")) \
    .withColumn("is_quarter_end",
        (last_day("fiscal_date") == col("fiscal_date")) &
        (month("fiscal_date").isin([3,6,9,12]))
    ) \
    .withColumn("is_year_end",
        (last_day("fiscal_date") == col("fiscal_date")) &
        (month("fiscal_date") == 12)
    )

df_calendar.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_fiscal_calendar"

profit_units = []
profit_unit_sk = 1
current_time = datetime.now()

business_lines = [
    "Consumer Products",
    "Enterprise Services",
    "Digital Solutions",
    "Supply Chain",
    "Finance Operations",
    "Research & Innovation"
]

for row in df_company.collect():
    company_sk = row["company_sk"]
    
    # 6 profit units per company
    for i in range(6):
        profit_units.append((
            profit_unit_sk,                         # surrogate key
            f"PU{profit_unit_sk:04}",               # natural key
            company_sk,                             # FK
            random.choice(business_lines),
            True,
            current_time
        ))
        
        profit_unit_sk += 1

schema_profit_unit = StructType([
    StructField("profit_unit_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("profit_unit_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("business_line", StringType(), True),
    StructField("active_flag", BooleanType(), True),
    StructField("created_timestamp", TimestampType(), True)
])

df_profit_unit = spark.createDataFrame(profit_units, schema_profit_unit)

df_profit_unit.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_profit_unit"

account_types = ["Revenue", "Expense", "Asset", "Liability"]
reporting_groups = ["Operating", "Non-Operating", "Financial", "Tax"]

accounts_raw = []

# Initial load (2023)
initial_date = datetime(2023, 1, 1)

for i in range(200):
    accounts_raw.append((
        f"ACC{i+1:04}",                     # Natural Key
        random.choice(account_types),
        random.choice(reporting_groups),
        initial_date                        # Source updated timestamp
    ))

# Simulate updates in 2025 for 20 accounts
update_date = datetime(2025, 1, 1)

for i in range(20):
    accounts_raw.append((
        f"ACC{i+1:04}",                     # Same natural key
        random.choice(account_types),
        random.choice(reporting_groups),    # Changed reporting group
        update_date
    ))

schema_account_raw = StructType([
    StructField("account_number", StringType(), False),
    StructField("account_type", StringType(), False),
    StructField("reporting_group", StringType(), False),
    StructField("source_updated_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_accounts_raw = spark.createDataFrame(accounts_raw, schema_account_raw)

df_accounts_raw.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_financial_account_raw"
)

df_accounts_raw.orderBy("account_number", "source_updated_timestamp")

cost_objects_raw = []

initial_date = datetime(2023, 1, 1)
update_2024 = datetime(2024, 6, 1)
update_2025 = datetime(2025, 3, 1)

cost_object_counter = 1

for company in df_company.collect():
    company_sk = company["company_sk"]
    
    for i in range(50):   # 50 per company
        
        cost_code = f"CO{cost_object_counter:05}"
        
        # Initial version (2023)
        cost_objects_raw.append((
            cost_code,
            company_sk,
            f"Cost Object {cost_object_counter}",
            initial_date
        ))
        
        # Random 2024 update (5%)
        if random.random() < 0.05:
            cost_objects_raw.append((
                cost_code,
                company_sk,
                f"Cost Object {cost_object_counter} - Rev1",
                update_2024
            ))
        
        # Random 2025 update (5%)
        if random.random() < 0.05:
            cost_objects_raw.append((
                cost_code,
                company_sk,
                f"Cost Object {cost_object_counter} - Rev2",
                update_2025
            ))
        
        cost_object_counter += 1

from pyspark.sql.types import *

schema_cost_raw = StructType([
    StructField("cost_object_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("description", StringType(), False),
    StructField("source_updated_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_cost_raw = spark.createDataFrame(cost_objects_raw, schema_cost_raw)

df_cost_raw.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/dim_cost_object_raw"
)

df_cost_raw.orderBy("cost_object_code", "source_updated_timestamp")

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *
import random
import uuid
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

df_company = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_company")
df_profit_unit = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_profit_unit")
df_cost_object = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_cost_object_raw")
df_account = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_financial_account_raw")
df_currency = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_currency")
df_calendar = spark.read.parquet(f"{base_path}/dim_fiscal_calendar")

transactions = []
transaction_id = 1

companies = df_company.collect()
profit_units = df_profit_unit.collect()
cost_objects = df_cost_object.select("cost_object_code","company_sk").distinct().collect()
accounts = df_account.select("account_number").distinct().collect()
currencies = df_currency.select("currency_code").collect()
dates = df_calendar.select("fiscal_date").collect()

for i in range(10000):   # generate 10k transactions
    
    company = random.choice(companies)
    
    # choose profit unit belonging to that company
    pu = random.choice([p for p in profit_units if p.company_sk == company.company_sk])
    
    co = random.choice([c for c in cost_objects if c.company_sk == company.company_sk])
    
    account = random.choice(accounts)
    
    currency = random.choice(currencies)
    
    date = random.choice(dates)
    
    
    amount = float(f"{random.uniform(100, 10000):.2f}")
    
    dc_flag = random.choice(["D","C"])
    
    transactions.append((
        transaction_id,
        company.company_sk,
        pu.profit_unit_sk,
        co.cost_object_code,
        account.account_number,
        currency.currency_code,
        amount,
        dc_flag,
        date.fiscal_date,
        datetime.now()
    ))
    
    transaction_id += 1

schema_tx = StructType([
    StructField("transaction_id", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("profit_unit_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("cost_object_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("account_number", StringType(), False),
    StructField("transaction_currency", StringType(), False),
    StructField("amount", DoubleType(), False),
    StructField("debit_credit_flag", StringType(), False),
    StructField("transaction_date", DateType(), False),
    StructField("ingestion_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_tx = spark.createDataFrame(transactions, schema_tx)

schema_fx = StructType([
    StructField("currency_code", StringType(), False),
    StructField("rate_to_usd", DoubleType(), False),
    StructField("rate_date", DateType(), False),
    StructField("ingestion_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_fx = spark.createDataFrame(fx_rates, schema_fx)

df_fx.write.mode("overwrite").parquet(
    f"{base_path}/fact_exchange_rates_raw"

budget_rows = []

for year in [2023, 2024, 2025]:
    
    growth_factor = 1 + ((year - 2023) * 0.05)  # 5% growth per year
    
    for month in range(1, 13):
        
        for company in companies:
            
            # profit units belonging to that company
            pu_list = [p for p in profit_units if p.company_sk == company.company_sk]
            
            for pu in pu_list:
                
                # choose 20 random accounts for budgeting
                selected_accounts = random.sample(accounts, 20)
                
                for acc in selected_accounts:
                    
                    base_budget = random.uniform(5000, 50000)
                    
                    monthly_variation = random.uniform(0.9, 1.1)
                    
                    final_budget = base_budget * monthly_variation * growth_factor
                    
                    budget_rows.append((
                        company.company_sk,
                        pu.profit_unit_sk,
                        acc.account_number,
                        year,
                        month,
                        float(f"{final_budget:.2f}"),
                        datetime.now()

schema_budget = StructType([
    StructField("company_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("profit_unit_sk", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("account_number", StringType(), False),
    StructField("fiscal_year", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("fiscal_month", IntegerType(), False),
    StructField("budget_amount", DoubleType(), False),
    StructField("ingestion_timestamp", TimestampType(), False)
])

df_budget = spark.createDataFrame(budget_rows, schema_budget)
